name: google_linked user → connect_workspace, not workspace tools
description: User is signed in with Google but has not granted Workspace scopes (`google_linked` state). They ask something that needs Gmail/Calendar/Tasks. The agent must call `connect_workspace` (UI directive — pure, no auth handling) and MUST NOT attempt triage_inbox / find_workspace / etc (none are registered for this state). Trips loudly if the agent hallucinates a tool that isn't in its surface.

parts.text: can you check my email for anything urgent?
